message: Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member(s) best able to assist.

body:
## ­¤Ä» Agentic Issue Triage

**Summary:** This auto-generated documentation gap issue identifies missing documentation for newly introduced public APIs in `Azure.AI.Projects.Agents` ŌĆö specifically `StructuredInputDefinition`, the `StructuredInputs` property on `DeclarativeAgentDefinition`, and the `ProjectsAgentProtocol.Invocations` enum value ŌĆö along with a request to update the CHANGELOG and add a sample.

<details>
<summary>­¤ōŗ Issue Details</summary>

**Package:** `Azure.AI.Projects.Agents` (2.1.0-beta.1, unreleased)
**Affected API:** `StructuredInputDefinition`, `DeclarativeAgentDefinition.StructuredInputs`, `ProjectsAgentProtocol.Invocations`, `AgentDefinitionOptInKeys.ContainerAgentsV1Preview`
**Scenarios:**
- New `StructuredInputDefinition` class lacks documentation, examples, and README mention
- `StructuredInputs` property on `DeclarativeAgentDefinition` is not documented in README or changelog
- `ProjectsAgentProtocol.Invocations` new enum value is undocumented
- `CHANGELOG.md` has empty `Features Added` section for `2.1.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)`

**Root ask:** Update CHANGELOG.md, README.md (add Structured Inputs subsection with sample code), and add a sample test demonstrating `StructuredInputDefinition` usage.
</details>

<details>
<summary>­¤öÄ Debugging / Reproduction Notes</summary>

This issue was auto-generated by the `Update Docs` workflow (run [24056971140](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/actions/runs/24056971140)) after PR #57741 (commit `812a89c` by @nick863) regenerated the `Azure.AI.Projects.Agents` package with new public API surface.

The issue body contains a detailed implementation guide covering all required file changes, including CHANGELOG.md updates, README.md additions, and a sample file at `sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Projects.Agents/tests/Samples/Sample_Agents_StructuredInputs.cs`.

**Suggested investigation steps:**
1. Review PR #57741 to confirm the full scope of new public API surface introduced
2. Follow the implementation guide in the issue body to update CHANGELOG.md, README.md, and add the sample test
3. Run `dotnet build sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Projects.Agents/`, then `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 ai` to inject snippets and validate
</details>

<details>
<summary>­¤ÅĘ’ĖÅ Label Confidence</summary>

- **Category:** `Client` ŌĆö `Azure.AI.Projects.Agents` is a client library (not management or provisioning); this is an SDK-side documentation issue
- **Service:** `AI Projects` ŌĆö the package lives in `sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Projects.Agents/` and matches the `%AI Projects` ServiceLabel entry in CODEOWNERS; confirmed by reference issues #56436 and #52355 which use the same label pair
- **Confidence:** High ŌĆö explicit package name and service directory in the issue body, unambiguous mapping to existing `AI Projects` service label and `Client` category
</details>
